lines.speaker: Sbott
lines.text: Hello stranger. Would you like me to tan any hides for you?

lines.speaker: Sbott
lines.text: Soft leather - 2 gp per hide Hard leather - 5 gp per hide Snakeskins - 25 gp per hide Dragon leather - 45 gp per hide.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why are you so expensive? The tanner in Al-Kharid is almost half the price!

lines.speaker: Sbott
lines.text: Hey, I charge more because I'm worth it! I deal in bulk, and I work extremely quickly. You'll see for yourself!

lines.speaker: Sbott
lines.text: You got a lot of hides you want tanning quickly? I'm your guy!

lines.speaker: Sbott
lines.text: So you got hides for me to tan, or are you just gonna bust my chops about prices all day?

lines.speaker: Sbott
lines.text: Okay; you change your mind, you come see me. I'm your guy!

lines.speaker: Sbott
lines.text: Hello stranger. Would you like me to tan any hides for you?

lines.speaker: Sbott

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why are you so expensive? The tanner in Al-Kharid is almost half the price!

lines.speaker: Sbott
lines.text: Hey, I charge more because I'm worth it! I deal in bulk, and I work extremely quickly. You'll see for yourself!

lines.speaker: Sbott
lines.text: You got a lot of hides you want tanning quickly? I'm your guy!

lines.speaker: Sbott

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks, I haven't any hides.

lines.speaker: Sbott
lines.text: Fair enough. I can't tan what you don't bring me.
